svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Class Definition and Access Specifiers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Class Definition Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="320" height="250" fill="white" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Class Name -->
  <rect x="150" y="70" width="120" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    MyClass
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Public Section -->
  <rect x="70" y="120" width="280" height="40" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="130" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32" opacity="0">
    public:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="145" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#1B5E20" opacity="0">
    void publicMethod();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="160" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#1B5E20" opacity="0">
    int publicVariable;
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Protected Section -->
  <rect x="70" y="180" width="280" height="40" fill="#FFF8E1" stroke="#FFC107" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="190" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#F57F17" opacity="0">
    protected:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="205" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#F57F17" opacity="0">
    void protectedMethod();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="220" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#F57F17" opacity="0">
    int protectedVariable;
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Private Section -->
  <rect x="70" y="240" width="280" height="40" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#F44336" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="250" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828" opacity="0">
    private:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="265" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#C62828" opacity="0">
    void privateMethod();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="280" font-family="Courier" font-size="10" fill="#C62828" opacity="0">
    int privateVariable;
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Access Specifier Labels -->
  <rect x="360" y="120" width="50" height="20" fill="#4CAF50" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="385" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Public
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="360" y="180" width="50" height="20" fill="#FFC107" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="385" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Protected
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="360" y="240" width="50" height="20" fill="#F44336" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="385" y="253" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Private
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from labels to sections -->
  <path d="M355 130 L350 130 L345 130" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M355 190 L350 190 L345 190" stroke="#FFC107" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M355 250 L350 250 L345 250" stroke="#F44336" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#666"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
